allow: Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "from docgen.cli import main; print\('Import OK'\)" 2>&1)

Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "
from docgen.scanner import scan_project
scan = scan_project\('.'\)
print\(scan.summary\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "
from docgen.scanner import scan_project
scan = scan_project\('.'\)
print\(scan.summary\(\)\)
print\(\)
print\(scan.tree\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(OPENAI_API_KEY=$OPENAI_API_KEY OPENAI_BASE_URL=$OPENAI_BASE_URL OPENAI_MODEL=$OPENAI_MODEL .venv/bin/python -c "
from openai import OpenAI
import os
client = OpenAI\(api_key=os.environ['OPENAI_API_KEY'], base_url=os.environ['OPENAI_BASE_URL']\)
resp = client.chat.completions.create\(
    model='mimo-v2.5-pro',
    messages=[{'role':'user','content':'Say OK'}],
    max_tokens=10
\)
print\(resp.choices[0].message.content\)
" 2>&1)
